action.reasoning: Observation: iter_3 with logit adjustment + mixup achieved only 0.4860 val_acc vs 0.6525 from iter_1/2. The logit adjustment conflicts with balanced sampling. Analysis: Need to go back to balanced sampling + standard CE, but use a stronger backbone. CLIP ViT-B/16 is pretrained on much more diverse data and should give better features for rare classes. Decision: Use CLIP ViT-B/16 with balanced sampling, label smoothing CE, cosine LR. Train 30 epochs to test.
